title: uv as the Python Lockfile Floor
one_liner: Standardize Python projects on uv with committed uv.lock; agents always invoke commands via uv run.

title: pyproject.toml as the Single Source of Configuration
one_liner: Concentrate every Python tool's config in pyproject.toml; forbid setup.cfg, tox.ini, .flake8, pytest.ini.

title: TypeScript Strict + isolatedDeclarations + Project References
one_liner: Enable strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes; libraries add isolatedDeclarations + composite refs.

title: pnpm Workspaces with Dependency Catalogs
one_liner: Use pnpm catalog: protocol for shared external deps and workspace:* for internal links to eliminate version drift.

title: Go to TypeScript DTO Contract via tygo
one_liner: Generate TS types from Go DTOs via tygo; commit output and fail CI on diff or any 'any'.

title: PHP Dual Gate: PHPStan Level 9 + Psalm Taint
one_liner: Run PHPStan level 9 plus Psalm taint analysis; both green required for merge, no mixed types or unsuppressed taint.

title: Mutation Testing as the Agent Feedback Signal
one_liner: Replace coverage gates with diff-scoped mutation testing and feed surviving mutants back to the agent until the score clears the threshold.

title: Property-Based Tests From LLM-Inferred Invariants
one_liner: Force agents to write properties from a closed five-class rubric, each grounded in a quoted docstring or type, before example tests.

title: Ruby Sorbet Strict Floor with Tapioca RBI
one_liner: Require typed:true minimum and Tapioca-generated RBIs; srb tc plus tapioca check-shims block the PR.

title: C# Roslyn Analyzers as Compile Errors + Public API Lock
one_liner: Escalate LLM bug-class analyzers to error severity and pin public surface via PublicApiAnalyzers shipped/unshipped files.

title: Swift Architecture as Tests via Harmonize + Swift Testing
one_liner: Encode layer and import rules as Harmonize @Test cases; swift-format plus SwiftLint plus swift test form the agent floor.

title: JVM One-Tag Release via JReleaser
one_liner: Drive JVM releases from a single git tag through jreleaser.yml to Sonatype Central Portal plus GitHub Release.

title: TDD with Red and Green in Separate Agents
one_liner: Split RED and GREEN into sub-agents with disjoint tool permissions; orchestrator asserts a real RED to GREEN transition before commit.

title: Self-Healing Locators with Mandatory Audit Diff
one_liner: Allow E2E selector self-healing only when role+accessible-name match; every heal lands as a reviewable diff before the next CI run consumes it.

title: Agent Drafts Spec Comment Before Any Diff
one_liner: On ticket assignment the agent posts a structured current/desired/plan comment and blocks until a non-bot approval signal clears the gate.

title: Error-Tracker to Draft-PR Pipeline
one_liner: On a thresholded production exception, dispatch a coding agent to open a draft PR with a patch and regression test bidirectionally linked to the alert.
